blog_title: Plain T-Shirt Factory Cost vs MRP — Why a ₹999 Branded Tee Costs Only ₹180 to Make in India
caption:
₹999 branded tee. ₹180 factory cost. 😳

We’ve been manufacturing in Tiruppur for 9 years — in-house fabric knitting. Exact costing: ₹100 fabric + ₹35 cut & stitch + ₹18 bio-wash + ₹27 overhead = ₹180 per piece.

The brand adds ₹819 for a logo, a paper bag, and a lit-up mall store.

Save this if you’re sourcing blanks for print-on-demand or building your own label. 👇
